name: @acsbe/accessflow-sdk
description: Playwright and Selenium SDK for AccessFlow auditor

scripts.build:all-packages: npm run build && npm run build:binaries && npm run copy:lang-assets && npm pack && npm run build:python && (npm run build:java || echo '⚠️  Java build skipped (Maven not found)') && npm run collect:packages && echo '✅ All packages built successfully!'
scripts.build:all-packages:prod: npm run build:binaries && npm run build:node:prod && npm run build:python:prod && (npm run build:java:prod || echo '⚠️  Java build skipped (Maven not found)') && npm run collect:packages && echo '✅ All production packages built successfully!'
scripts.build:auditor: cd ../auditor && npm i --production=false && npm run build
scripts.build:binaries: npm run build && pkg dist/src/engine/main.js --targets node18-macos-x64,node18-macos-arm64,node18-linux-x64,node18-win-x64 --output bin/aflow-core --compress Brotli
scripts.build:binaries:info: ls -lh bin/ && echo '✅ Binaries built successfully!'
scripts.build:java: cd java && mvn clean package && echo '✅ Java package built successfully!'
scripts.build:js-python: npm run build && npm run build:binaries && npm run copy:python-assets && npm pack && npm run build:python && npm run collect:packages && echo '✅ JavaScript and Python packages built successfully!'
scripts.build:node: npm run build && npm run pack:node && npm run clean:temp && npm run pack:node:info
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:binaries && npm run clean:python && npm run clean:java && rm -rf dist packages acsbe-accessflow-sdk-*.tgz
scripts.clean:java: cd java && mvn clean && rm -rf src/main/resources/bin/* src/main/resources/assets/*
scripts.clean:python: rm -rf python/dist python/build python/*.egg-info python/accessflow_sdk/bin/* python/accessflow_sdk/assets/*
scripts.clean:temp: rm -rf package sdk.config.js sdk.config.d.ts dist/sdk.config.js dist/sdk.config.d.ts
scripts.collect:packages: mkdir -p packages && (cp acsbe-accessflow-sdk-*.tgz packages/acsbe-accessflow-sdk.tgz && rm acsbe-accessflow-sdk-*.tgz 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp python/dist/*.whl packages/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp python/dist/*.tar.gz packages/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (find java/target -maxdepth 1 -name 'accessflow-sdk-[0-9]*.jar' ! -name '*-javadoc.jar' ! -name '*-sources.jar' -exec cp {} packages/accessflow-sdk.jar \; 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  Java JAR not found, skipping') && echo '✅ All packages collected in packages/ folder'
scripts.copy:assets: npm run copy:auditor && npm run copy:rules
scripts.copy:java-assets: npm run inject-config && mkdir -p java/src/main/resources/bin && mkdir -p java/src/main/resources/assets && cp bin/* java/src/main/resources/bin/ && cp dist/src/assets/auditor.js dist/src/assets/auditor.css dist/src/assets/rules.json java/src/main/resources/assets/
scripts.copy:lang-assets: npm run copy:python-assets && npm run copy:java-assets
scripts.copy:python-assets: npm run inject-config && mkdir -p python/accessflow_sdk/bin && mkdir -p python/accessflow_sdk/assets && cp bin/* python/accessflow_sdk/bin/ && cp dist/src/assets/auditor.js dist/src/assets/auditor.css dist/src/assets/rules.json python/accessflow_sdk/assets/
scripts.pack:node:info: ls -lh *.tgz 2>/dev/null | tail -1 && echo '✅ Tarball created successfully!'
scripts.prebuild: npm run convert:rules && npm run build:auditor && npm run copy:assets
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:playwright && npm run test:selenium
